schema: {"type":"object","title":"图片区块配置","description":"配置图片展示区块,支持移动端和Web端区分图片","properties":{"title":{"type":"string","title":"区块标题","description":"图片区块的可选标题"},"description":{"type":"string","title":"区块描述","description":"图片区块的可选描述"},"webImage":{"type":"string","title":"Web端图片","description":"Web端显示的图片","ui":{"widget":"image","placeholder":"请上传Web端图片"}},"mobileImage":{"type":"string","title":"移动端图片","description":"移动端显示的图片(可选,不填则使用Web端图片)","ui":{"widget":"image","placeholder":"请上传移动端图片"}},"alt":{"type":"string","title":"图片描述","description":"图片的替代文本,用于无障碍访问"},"caption":{"type":"string","title":"图片说明","description":"图片下方的说明文字"},"width":{"type":"number","title":"图片宽度","description":"设置图片宽度(像素)","default":1200},"containerPaddingX":{"type":"string","title":"容器左右间距","description":"设置外部容器的左右间距值","default":"1.5rem"},"containerPaddingY":{"type":"string","title":"容器上下间距","description":"设置外部容器的上下间距值","default":"0"},"containerType":{"type":"string","title":"容器类型","description":"选择图片区块的容器类型","enum":["section","empty"],"default":"section"},"backgroundColor":{"type":"string","title":"区块背景色","description":"选择区块的背景颜色","default":"#ffffff"}}}
